hero.subtitle: Rwanda's most admired supermarket - a testament to the country's economic resurgence, proudly meeting the daily needs of Kigali and beyond since 2008.

origin.heading: Where It All Began
origin.paragraph1: SIMBA SUPERMARKET LTD was established on December 3, 2007, as a Limited Liability Company with a clear ambition: to become the region's largest retail outlet. Founded by Mr. Teklay Teame and his partners, the company imports products from Europe, Egypt, Dubai, China, Turkey, and beyond to ensure a truly diverse product range.
origin.paragraph2: The official launch on August 8, 2008 created over 450 jobs for Rwandese citizens. With 11 branches across Rwanda, Simba provides a one-stop shopping experience - butchery, bakery, coffee shop, and more - serving international organisations, local NGOs, private companies, and government ministries.

respect.title: Respect for the Individual
respect.body: We're hardworking, ordinary people who've teamed up to accomplish extraordinary things. We treat each other with dignity and encourage everyone to express their thoughts - this is how we show respect.

service.title: Service to Customers
service.body: Our customers are the reason we're in business. We offer quality merchandise at the lowest prices with the best customer service possible, always seeking to exceed expectations.

excellence.title: Striving for Excellence
excellence.body: We're proud of our accomplishments but never satisfied. We constantly reach further to bring new ideas and goals to life - Is this the best I can do? That question drives everything.

2007.label: Founded
2007.desc: Established as a Limited Liability Company on December 3rd by Mr. Teklay Teame and partners.

2008.label: 1st Branch
2008.desc: Official launch on August 8th - Simba Centenary opens, creating over 450 jobs for Rwandese citizens.

2014.label: Expanding
2014.desc: Simba Gishushu branch opens. Awarded Best Exhibitor Retail & Distribution - EBM Best Award.

2015.label: Growing
2015.desc: Simba Kimironko branch opens. Awarded RRA Compliant Taxpayer status.

2016.label: Scaling Up
2016.desc: Two new branches open - Simba Kicukiro and Simba Kigali Height.

2019.label: City Centre
2019.desc: Simba UTC opens in the heart of Kigali.

2020.label: Merchant of Year
2020.desc: Awarded 1st Merchant of the Year in Rwanda.

2023.label: Major Expansion
2023.desc: Five new branches launch simultaneously - Simba Gacuriro, Simba Gikondo, Simba Sonatube, Simba Kisimenti, and Simba Rebero.

2024.label: Going Digital
2024.desc: Simba Online Sales launches - bringing the supermarket experience directly to customers' doors.

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Find quick answers to the most common questions about shopping at Simba Supermarket.

0.q: How do I place an order online?
0.a: Visit our website, browse products, add items to your cart, and proceed to checkout. You will need to create an account or sign in to complete your purchase.

1.q: Can I modify or cancel my order after placing it?
1.a: Orders can be modified or cancelled within 30 minutes of placing them. After that window, the order enters fulfilment and changes are no longer possible. Please contact us immediately if you need to make changes.

2.q: How will I know my order has been confirmed?
2.a: You will receive a confirmation email with your order number and summary immediately after checkout. You can also track your order status in your account dashboard.

3.q: What payment methods do you accept?
3.a: We accept MTN Mobile Money, Airtel Money, Visa, Mastercard, and cash on delivery for eligible orders. All online transactions are secured with industry-standard encryption.

0.q: Which areas do you deliver to?
0.a: We currently deliver to all major neighbourhoods within Kigali city, including Nyamirambo, Kimironko, Kicukiro, Gasabo, and surrounding areas. Expand to more districts is ongoing.

1.a: Standard delivery takes 2–4 hours for in-stock items ordered before 3 PM. Express delivery is available within 1 hour for an additional fee. Same-day delivery is guaranteed for orders placed before noon.

2.q: Is there a minimum order for delivery?
2.a: Yes, the minimum order for delivery is 5,000 RWF. Orders below this amount are eligible for in-store pickup only.

3.a: Standard delivery costs 1,000 RWF. Express delivery costs 2,500 RWF. Orders above 50,000 RWF qualify for free standard delivery.

0.a: We accept returns within 7 days of purchase for most non-perishable items, provided they are unopened and in their original packaging with proof of purchase.

1.q: How do I initiate a return?
1.a: Contact our customer support team via the Contact Us page or call our helpline. Our team will guide you through the return process and arrange collection or drop-off.

2.q: When will I receive my refund?
2.a: Refunds are processed within 3–5 business days once the return is received and inspected. Mobile money refunds are typically faster than card refunds.

0.q: Are your products fresh and quality-assured?
0.a: Absolutely. All fresh produce, meats, and bakery items are sourced daily and quality-checked before being placed on shelves. We adhere strictly to food safety standards.

1.a: Yes, Simba imports products from Europe, Dubai, China, Egypt, Turkey, and other countries. You will find both international brands and quality local products across all categories.

2.q: Can I check product availability before visiting?
2.a: Yes, you can browse our full catalogue on the website or app and filter by branch location to see real-time stock availability.

0.q: How do I create an account?
0.a: Click Sign Up on the top navigation, enter your name, phone number or email address, and create a password. You can also sign up quickly using your Google account.

1.q: I forgot my password. What should I do?
1.a: Click Forgot Password on the login page and enter your registered email address. You will receive a reset link within a few minutes. Check your spam folder if you do not see it.

2.q: How do I update my delivery address?
2.a: Log in to your account, go to Settings, and select Addresses. You can add, edit, or remove delivery addresses from there. Changes take effect on your next order.

contact.heading: Still have questions?
contact.body: Our team is available 7 days a week to help you with anything you need.

hero.title: Returns Policy
hero.subtitle: We want you to be completely satisfied with every purchase. If something is not right, we will make it right.

items.damaged: Damaged or defective products on arrival

items.perishable: Fresh produce, meats, and perishable goods
items.used: Opened or used personal care and cosmetics

process.heading: How to return an item
process.subtitle: Follow these simple steps and our team will handle the rest.

contact.title: Contact our team
contact.desc: Reach out via the Contact Us page, call our helpline, or visit any Simba branch within 7 days of purchase.

pack.title: Pack the item
pack.desc: Ensure the item is in its original packaging with all accessories, tags, and your receipt or order confirmation.

drop.title: Drop off or arrange collection
drop.desc: Drop the item at any Simba branch or request a collection from your address for a small fee.

refund.title: Receive your refund
refund.desc: Once inspected and approved, your refund will be issued within 3–5 business days via your original payment method.

original.title: Original payment method
original.desc: Refunded to the card or mobile money account used for the original purchase.

storeCredit.title: Store credit
storeCredit.desc: Receive the full amount as store credit, valid for 12 months across all Simba branches.

exchange.title: Exchange
exchange.desc: Swap for the same item or an item of equal value at any Simba branch.

note.heading: Important note
note.body: Simba Supermarket reserves the right to refuse returns that do not meet our policy conditions. In-store purchases must be returned to a physical branch; online orders may be returned in-store or via our collection service.

privacy.intro: At Simba Supermarket, your privacy matters deeply to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you shop with us online or in-store.

collection.heading: Information We Collect
collection.body: We collect information you provide directly and information generated when you use our services.

points.0: Name, email address, and phone number when you register
points.1: Delivery address and payment method details
points.2: Order history and product browsing behaviour
points.3: Device type, IP address, and browser information

use.heading: How We Use Your Information
use.body: Your data is used solely to improve your shopping experience and fulfil our service commitments.

points.1: Sending order confirmations and delivery updates
points.3: Improving our website and service quality

sharing.heading: Sharing Your Information
sharing.body: We do not sell your personal data. We may share it only with trusted service partners.

points.0: Delivery partners to fulfil your orders
points.1: Payment processors to handle transactions securely
points.2: Analytics providers to improve our services
points.3: Regulatory authorities when required by law

security.heading: How We Protect Your Data
security.body: We use industry-standard security practices including SSL encryption, secure servers, and regular security audits to protect your personal information from unauthorised access or disclosure.

cookies.heading: Cookies & Tracking
cookies.body: We use cookies to remember your preferences, keep you logged in, and understand how you use our site. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, though some features may not work as expected.

contact.heading: Questions About Your Privacy
contact.body: If you have any questions about this policy or wish to exercise your data rights, please contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@simbasupermarket.rw or visit any of our branches in person.

rights.heading: Your Rights
rights.body: Under applicable data protection law, you have the following rights regarding your personal information.

hero.title: Delivery Information
hero.subtitle: Fast, reliable delivery from our branches directly to your door across Kigali and beyond.

standard.title: Standard
standard.note: Best for planned shopping. Order before 3 PM for same-day standard delivery.

express.title: Express
express.note: Need it fast? Express delivery brings your order in under an hour from your nearest branch.

sameDay.title: Free Delivery
sameDay.note: Orders above 50,000 RWF qualify for complimentary standard delivery.

zones.heading: Delivery Zones
zones.subtitle: We currently deliver to all major areas within Kigali. More districts coming soon.

order.title: Place your order
order.desc: Add items to your cart and select delivery at checkout.

confirm.title: Order confirmed
confirm.desc: You receive an SMS and email confirmation instantly.

dispatch.title: Dispatched
dispatch.desc: Our team packs your order at the nearest branch.

deliver.title: Delivered to you
deliver.desc: Your rider delivers to your door within the promised window.

cutoff.title: Order cut-off times
cutoff.desc: Orders placed after 7 PM will be delivered the next morning from 8 AM.

packaging.title: Packaging
packaging.desc: All orders are packed hygienically and securely to preserve quality.

tracking.title: Order tracking
tracking.desc: Track your delivery in real-time via the app or your SMS confirmation link.

failed.title: Failed delivery
failed.desc: If we cannot reach you, we will hold your order for 2 hours before returning it. A re-delivery fee may apply.

contact.heading: Delivery questions?
contact.body: Our support team is available 7 days a week.

hero.title: Terms of Service
hero.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our website, mobile app, or any Simba Supermarket service.

terms.banner: By accessing or using any Simba Supermarket service, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

acceptance.heading: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: These Terms of Service govern your use of the Simba Supermarket website, mobile application, and all related services. By creating an account, placing an order, or simply browsing our platform, you acknowledge that you have read and agree to these terms. These terms apply to all users including visitors, registered customers, and business clients. Simba Supermarket reserves the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

purchases.heading: Purchases & Orders
purchases.body: When you place an order with Simba Supermarket, you are making an offer to purchase goods subject to these terms. All orders are subject to availability and confirmation.

points.0: Orders are confirmed only upon receipt of payment or payment authorisation
points.1: Prices are displayed in Rwandan Francs (RWF) and are inclusive of applicable taxes
points.2: We reserve the right to cancel orders due to stock unavailability or pricing errors
points.3: Bulk or commercial orders may require prior arrangement and are subject to separate terms

payments.heading: Payment Terms
payments.body: Simba Supermarket accepts MTN Mobile Money, Airtel Money, Visa, Mastercard, and cash on delivery for eligible orders. All online payments are processed through secure, encrypted gateways. By providing payment details, you confirm that you are authorised to use the payment method. In the event of a failed payment, your order will be cancelled and you will be notified. Any disputes regarding charges should be raised with our customer support team within 14 days of the transaction.

liability.heading: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Simba Supermarket shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services.

points.0: We are not liable for delays caused by circumstances beyond our reasonable control
points.1: Our liability for any claim is limited to the value of the order in dispute
points.2: We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation of our digital platforms
points.3: Product images are for illustration only; actual products may vary slightly

prohibited.heading: Prohibited Activities
prohibited.body: You agree not to misuse our services or assist others in doing so. The following activities are strictly prohibited:

points.0: Using our platform for any unlawful, fraudulent, or harmful purpose
points.1: Attempting to gain unauthorised access to our systems or data
points.2: Submitting false, misleading, or abusive reviews or content
points.3: Reselling products purchased from Simba without prior written consent

disputes.heading: Dispute Resolution
disputes.body: In the event of a dispute arising from these terms or your use of our services, we encourage you to first contact our customer support team to seek an amicable resolution. If a dispute cannot be resolved informally, it shall be submitted to the competent courts of Rwanda in accordance with applicable Rwandan law. Simba Supermarket is committed to fair and transparent resolution of all customer concerns.

changes.heading: Changes to These Terms
changes.body: Simba Supermarket reserves the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. When we make significant changes, we will notify registered users via email or an in-app notification at least 14 days before the changes take effect. The effective date at the top of this page will always reflect the most recent revision. Your continued use of our services after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.body: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding these Terms of Service, please do not hesitate to reach out to us. Our legal and customer support teams are available to assist you. You can contact us via the Contact Us page on our website, by emailing legal@simbasupermarket.rw, or by visiting any of our 11 branches across Rwanda in person.

agreement.heading: You are protected
agreement.body: These terms exist to protect both you and Simba Supermarket. We are committed to transparency, fairness, and exceptional service for every customer.
